summary: Brand kit testing complete - all features working correctly. BGCA brand colors, logos, and settings are properly applied throughout the app.

issues: Sidebar uses Coins icon instead of BGCA logo - inconsistent with other pages that use AdminLayout

passed_tests: Login page shows BGCA logo (logo-horizontal.png)
Login page shows 'ClubPay' heading with Libre Franklin font
Login page shows 'Digital Bucks' tagline in brand blue (#0080c6)
Login page has brand blue Sign In button
Login flow works: admin@clubbucks.com / ClubBucks2024! redirects to dashboard
Dashboard sidebar shows BGCA logo
Dashboard sidebar shows 'ClubPay' label
Dashboard nav items use brand blue (#0080c6) for active state - rgb(0, 128, 198)
Dashboard shows 258 active members for JAMS Club
Settings page loads with BGCA Brand Kit color presets (Official, Navy, Purple, Pink)
Settings page shows current primary color as #0080c6
Settings page shows current accent color as #84bd00
GET /api/settings/public returns app_name=ClubPay with brand colors
GET /api/settings returns full settings for authenticated admin
PUT /api/settings updates settings successfully for admin
Members page loads with club filtering working (258 total members in JAMS Club)
Clubs page (/admin/clubs) shows JAMS Club with 258 members
Transactions page loads correctly (7 transactions in JAMS Club)
Leaderboard page loads correctly with top earners
POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
action_items: MINOR: Update ClubManagementPage.js sidebar to use BGCA logo instead of Coins icon for consistency with AdminLayout
critical_code_review_comments: ClubManagementPage.js has its own sidebar implementation instead of using AdminLayout component - consider refactoring to use AdminLayout for consistency
seed_data_creation: None - used existing JAMS Club data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand kit fully applied. BGCA colors: Blue #0080c6 (primary), Green #84bd00 (accent), Navy #004b87, Purple #61279e, Pink #ed40a9. Font: Libre Franklin. Logos in /public/brand/. Settings stored in app_settings collection. ClubManagementPage has minor inconsistency with sidebar logo.

colors.primary_blue: #0080c6 - verified in settings and nav active state

typography.body_font: DM Sans - verified in body text
